title: Bhagavati Sutra: Dialogues with Mahavira
description: The longest text in the Jain canon — Mahavira's dialogues on cosmology, karma, and the nature of the soul.
introduction: The longest text in the Jain canon — Mahavira's dialogues on cosmology, karma, and the nature of the soul.

translation.text: Gautama asked Mahavira: 'Lord, how many types of living beings are there?' Mahavira replied: 'There are beings with one sense, two senses, three, four, and five senses. Even in a drop of water there are countless beings.'
